data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption of data in transit and at rest to protect user data.
data.technical_spec: Uses AES-256 encryption and TLS for data transport security.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Strong authentication protocols to secure user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication and OAuth 2.0 are employed for user access control.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates a Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and regular pen testing.

data.title: Firewall and Intrusion Detection
data.description: Network security implemented via firewalls and intrusion detection systems.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes advanced firewalls and intrusion detection/prevention systems to monitor and protect network traffic.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defense mechanisms to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service Attacks.
data.technical_spec: Cloud-based anti-DDoS infrastructure and traffic filtering technologies.
